mapper.select: SELECT SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD as code , SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD ASC

SELECT SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD as code , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD
1=1
AND SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD BETWEEN #{startCd} AND #{endCd}
ORDER BY SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT DISTINCT(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD) as code , SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD as name FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST WHERE SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD <> 'CT0005' ORDER BY SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD ASC
SELECT DISTINCT(SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD) as code , SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD as name FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST WHERE SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = 'CT0005' ORDER BY SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD ASC
SELECT SUSE_STATUS_CD as code , SUSE_STATUS_NM as name FROM MST.TB_USE_SATAUS_CD ORDER BY SUSE_STATUS_CD ASC
SELECT SUSE_TYPE_CD as code , SUSE_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_USE_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SUSE_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SBOARD_TYPE_CD as code , SBOARD_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_BOARD_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SBOARD_TYPE_CD ASC

SELECT SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD as code , SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_NM as name FROM MST.TB_BOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD
1=1
AND SBOARD_TYPE_CD = #{sboardTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR}
ORDER BY SBOARD_TYPE_SUB_CD ASC
SELECT SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD as code , SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_EXTERNAL_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SHNDSET_USE_STTUS_CD as code , SHNDSET_USE_STTUS_NM as name FROM MST.TB_HNDSET_USE_STTUS_CD ORDER BY SHNDSET_USE_STTUS_CD ASC
SELECT SMENU_HIER_TYPE_CD as code , SMENU_HIER_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_MENU_HIER_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SMENU_HIER_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SORG_BCOM_TYPE_CD as code , SORG_BCOM_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_ORG_BCOM_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SORG_BCOM_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SPRSNL_ORG_TYPE_CD as code , SPRSNL_ORG_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_PRSNL_ORG_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SPRSNL_ORG_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SSCRN_TYPE_CD as code , SSCRN_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SCRN_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SSCRN_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SSCRN_URL_TYPE_CD as code , SSCRN_URL_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SCRN_URL_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SSCRN_URL_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SSVC_HGROUP_CD as code , SSVC_HGROUP_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SVC_HGROUP_CD ORDER BY SSVC_HGROUP_CD ASC
SELECT SSVC_MGROUP_CD as code , SSVC_MGROUP_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD ORDER BY SSVC_MGROUP_CD ASC
SELECT SSVC_LGROUP_CD as code , SSVC_LGROUP_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD ORDER BY SSVC_LGROUP_CD ASC

SELECT SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD as code , SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD
1=1
AND SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD BETWEEN #{startCd} AND #{endCd}
ORDER BY SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD as code , SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SSVCNW_TYPE_CD as code , SSVCNW_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_SVCNW_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SSVCNW_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_CD as code , SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_USER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SUSER_CONN_RESLT_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SUSER_GRADE_CD as code , SUSER_GRADE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_USER_GRADE_CD ORDER BY SUSER_GRADE_CD ASC
SELECT SUSER_STTUS_CD as code , SUSER_STTUS_NM as name FROM MST.TB_USER_STTUS_CD ORDER BY SUSER_STTUS_CD ASC
SELECT SUSER_TYPE_CD as code , SUSER_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_USER_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SUSER_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD as code , SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_NM as name FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD ORDER BY SLVL_BAS_LEVEL_CD ASC

SELECT SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD as code , SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM as name FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD
1=1
AND SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD BETWEEN #{startCd} AND #{endCd}
ORDER BY SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD ASC

SELECT A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD as code , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD A
, ( SELECT DISTINCT A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD FROM MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_MST A, MST.TB_IPMS_SVC_SUB B WHERE A.NIPMS_SVC_SEQ = B.NIPMS_SVC_MST_SEQ AND A.SUSE_TYPE_CD = 'CY0001' AND B.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd} UNION SELECT 'SA0000' FROM DUAL ) B WHERE A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = B.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD
ORDER BY A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ASC
SELECT SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD as code , SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM as name FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHERE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD BETWEEN 'IA0001' AND 'IA0004' ORDER BY SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD ASC
SELECT SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD as code , SASSIGN_LEVEL_NM as name FROM MST.TB_ASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHERE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD BETWEEN 'IA0004' AND 'IA0006' ORDER BY SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD
SELECT A.SLVL_CD as code , A.SLVL_NM as name FROM MST.TB_LVL_CD A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SLVL_CD NOT IN ('000000') AND SORG_OFFICE_FLAG_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.SLVL_CD , A.SLVL_NM ORDER BY A.SLVL_NM
SELECT SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD as code , SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_EXTERNAL_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SEX_LINK_USE_TYPE_CD
SELECT SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD as code , SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SREQUEST_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD
SELECT SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD as code , SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_NM as name FROM MST.TB_REQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD ORDER BY SREQUEST_AS_TYPE_CD

SELECT SFCLT_TYPE as code , SFCLT_TYPE as name FROM MST.TB_TACS_FCLT_CMD_MST
1=1
AND SUSE_YN = #{suseYn}
GROUP BY SFCLT_TYPE ORDER BY SFCLT_TYPE

SELECT SFCLT_TYPE as code , SFCLT_TYPE as name FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_FCLT_CMD_MST
1=1
AND SUSE_YN = #{suseYn}
GROUP BY SFCLT_TYPE ORDER BY SFCLT_TYPE

SELECT SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD as code , SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_NM as name FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD
1=1
GROUP BY SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD , SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_NM ORDER BY SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD

SELECT SEXCPT_CD AS code , SEXCPT_NM AS name FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_EXCPT_CD
1=1
GROUP BY SEXCPT_CD , SEXCPT_NM ORDER BY SEXCPT_CD
SELECT DISTINCT(SIP_PRIVATE_REQ_MST_SEQ_CD) as code , SIP_PRIVATE_REQ_MST_SEQ_CD as name FROM MST.TB_IP_PRIVATE_REQ_MST ORDER BY SIP_PRIVATE_REQ_MST_SEQ_CD ASC
SELECT NIP_HIST_TASK_CD as code , SIP_HIST_TASK_NM as name FROM LOG.TB_IP_HIST_TASK_CD ORDER BY NIP_HIST_TASK_CD
